publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-04-19 18:40:18 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Original illustrations and prepress proofs of cartoon art. Comic strips represented include the Berrys, Bi-focals, the Bungle Family, Cicero's Cat, the Flintstones, Grafitti, Gunther, Heathcliff, the Jackson Twins, Joe Palooka, Mickey Finn, Mutt and Jeff, Sal A. Mander, Sparky Watts, Stoker, This Funny World, and Yogi Bear. Also includes releases compiled by McNaught Syndicate.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Original illustrations and prepress proofs of cartoon art. Comic strips represented include the Berrys, Bi-focals, the Bungle Family, Cicero's Cat, the Flintstones, Grafitti, Gunther, Heathcliff, the Jackson Twins, Joe Palooka, Mickey Finn, Mutt and Jeff, Sal A. Mander, Sparky Watts, Stoker, This Funny World, and Yogi Bear. Also includes releases compiled by McNaught Syndicate.

emph.ref: Series I. Cartoon Art, Prints, and Releases
Subseries Ia. The Berrys by Carl Grubert
Subseries Ib. Bi-Focals by Ruth Marcus
Subseries Ic. The Bungle Family by HJ Tuthill
Subseries Id. Cicero's Cat by Al Smith
Subseries Ie. Dixie Dugan by McEvoy and Striebel
Subseries If. The Flintstones by Hanna-Barbera
Subseries Ig. Graffiti by Bill Leary
Subseries Ih. Gunther by John Roman
Subseries Ii. Heathcliff by George Gately
Subseries Ij. The Jackson Twins by Dick Brooks
Subseries Ik. Joe Palooka by Tony DiPreta
Subseries Il. Mickey Finn by MS Weiss
Subseries Im. Mutt and Jeff by Al Smith
Subseries Im. Mutt and Jeff by Al Smith
Subseries In. Red Ryder by Fred Harman
Subseries Io. Sal A. Mander by Fred Harman
Subseries Ip. Sparky Watts by Boody Rogers
Subseries Iq. Stoker by Henry Boltinoff
Subseries Ir. This Funny World by various artists, listed alphabetically
Subseries Is. Yogi Bear by Hanna-Barbera
Subseries It. Miscellaneous comics
Series II. Political Cartoons
Series III. Miscellaneous Promotional Materials
Series IV. McNaught Files

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cartoon art collection, #8030. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Cartoon Art, Prints, and Releases
Subseries Ia. The Berrys by Carl Grubert
45 original drawings. Originals of The Berrys weekly strip from 1945, unsigned.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Carl Grubert begins signing his name to the strips on August 8, 1946.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Colored proofs of The Berrys weekly strip from 1946, small size, some are undated, but all are filed in order by date by being matched with the originals.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Colored proofs of The Berrys weekly strip, large size, undated but from August-September 1946 based on originals.

did.unittitle: Subseries Ib. Bi-Focals by Ruth Marcus

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 9 original drawings, Sunday strips, some hand-colored by artist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 4 original drawings, Sunday strips, some hand-colored by artist

did.unittitle: Subseries Ic. The Bungle Family by HJ Tuthill

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of strips for 1936 on verso of releases of Look Here column by Charles B. Driscoll, 1938.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proofs of full-page weekly strips , with list of strips on verso of releases of Look Here column by Charles B. Driscoll, 1938.

did.unittitle: Subseries Id. Cicero's Cat by Al Smith
Subseries Ie. Dixie Dugan by McEvoy and Striebel
Subseries If. The Flintstones by Hanna-Barbera

scopecontent.p: Black and white copies of Sunday strips.

did.unittitle: Yogi Bear and The Flintstones film proofs

scopecontent.p: 3 sheets, Yogi Bear and Flintstones on same sheet.

did.unittitle: The Flintstones daily and Sunday releases
The Flintstones, dailies and Sunday releases
Subseries Ig. Graffiti by Bill Leary

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 62 original single panel daily strips, many written not drawn, includes paste-up of similar strip called Bumper Sticker, set of numbered backgrounds for Graffiti, undated panels of Graffiti, some of which may be from 1968 and before based on topical references to political figures, Chicago convention, election, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 60 original single panel daily strips, many written not drawn, includes paste-up of similar strip called Bumper Sticker, set of numbered backgrounds for Graffiti, undated panels of Graffiti, some of which may be from 1968 and before based on topical references to political figures, Chicago convention, election, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 62 original single panel daily strips, many written not drawn, includes paste-up of similar strip called Bumper Sticker, set of numbered backgrounds for Graffiti, undated panels of Graffiti, some of which may be from 1968 and before based on topical references to political figures, Chicago convention, election, etc.

scopecontent.p: 35 original single panel daily strips, many written not drawn

scopecontent.p: Copies of Sunday strips with numbered instructions for coloring.

scopecontent.p: 4 files of negatives for Sunday strips, filed according to size.

scopecontent.p: 4 files of negatives for Sunday strips, filed according to size.

The Jackson Twins, daily and Sunday releases

scopecontent.p: Copies of weekly releases, not originals.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 20 original drawings, featuring Uncle Phil, Sunday strips.

did.unittitle: Subseries Im. Mutt and Jeff by Al Smith

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 90 original daily strips, phone messages from Bill Olsen, Helena Norman, and Bruce Frazer written on back of March 23 strip.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 37 original Sunday strips, one strip missing glued on additions.

did.unittitle: Subseries In. Red Ryder by Fred Harman
Subseries Io. Sal A. Mander by Chris Gassett
Subseries Io. Sparky Watts by Boody Rogers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 5 original drawings. Original drawings of Sparky Watts by Boody Rogers, 5 pages of what may either be an issue of Sparky Watts or a segment of Sparky Watts in Big Shot Comics. There is no date, but it was found in a box of proofs from the mid-1940s. These pages are not in any of the proofs of Big Shot Comics or Sparky Watts included in the box of proofs.

did.unittitle: Subseries Iq. Stoker by Henry Boltinoff
Subseries Ir. This Funny World by various artists, alphabetically

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 43 original drawings. Subjects include, police/law, hunting, fencing, librarians, psychiatrists, boxing, office.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 12 original drawings. Subjects include doctors, mountain climbing, hunting.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 30 original drawings, oversized. Subjects include doctors, law, sports, scouts, hippies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 31 original drawings. Subjects include baseball, tennis.

scopecontent.p: 1 original drawing, oversized. Subject includes fishing.

scopecontent.p: Black and white line cuts by various artists. These are not originals but are paste-ups of cartoons to be printed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proofs and newsprint copies. Barker Bill by Terry, Dud Dudley by Zekley, Mickey Finn by Leonard, and The Nebbs by Hess.
